mapper.update: UPDATE project_topic SET topic_name = #{topicName}, topic_type = #{topicType}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, student_limit = #{studentLimit}, team_limit = #{teamLimit}, topic_content = #{topicContent}, develop_tools = #{developTools}, technical_route = #{technicalRoute}, selection_start_time = #{selectionStartTime}, selection_end_time = #{selectionEndTime} WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
UPDATE project_topic SET is_deleted = 1, delete_time = NOW() WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
UPDATE project_topic SET status = #{status} WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
UPDATE project_topic SET open_status = #{openStatus} WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
